meta.title: Typography
meta.description: Type scale, weight, and usage rules — the typographic system for clear hierarchy and consistent reading.

hero.title: Typography
hero.desc: Typography is the primary surface where the product talks to its users. The system defines a balanced scale, weight palette, and line-height to communicate hierarchy and keep reading effortless. Apply per intent — typeface and weight follow purpose, not preference.

typeUsage.title: Type Usage
typeUsage.descLine1: The scale is a recommendation, not a hard constraint.
typeUsage.descLine2: Locking designers into a single scale removes flexibility. The system suggests font sizes and weights; designers compose freely on top of them.
typeUsage.noteBelow12: For readability and accessibility, avoid font sizes below 12pt.

scaleLogic.title: Type Scale Logic
scaleLogic.descLine1: The scale starts at 12px and expands its step size every four levels.
scaleLogic.descLine2: Small body up through emphasis and headlines — each level adds enough contrast to read structurally, without breaking the rhythm.
scaleLogic.formula: The scale is computed as Xₙ = Xₙ₋₁ + {{ INT[(n−2)/4] + 1 }} × 2 — 2px steps at the low end, 4px in the middle, 6px at the top.
scaleLogic.formulaSub: Small steps preserve readability at the bottom; larger steps deliver clearer emphasis at the top.

typeWeight.title: Type Weight
typeWeight.desc: The system uses Pretendard as the base typeface, with weights at Regular (400), Medium (500), and Semi Bold (600).

typeScale.title: Type Scale
typeScale.desc: Use the same scale for screen-level hierarchy and the hierarchy inside a component.

rows.desc: Default titles, emphasized inline copy, button labels

items.label: Navigation bar (exception)
items.text: Main navigation uses Subtitle 1, Body 1 (letter spacing −0.5%).

items.label: Subtitle & body (exception)
items.text: When subtitle or body text wraps to two lines: 12px → line-height 120%; 14, 16px → line-height 140%.

items.label: Modal
items.text: Header 24, Subtitle Medium 14, Info text Regular 14.
